title: Xtra Light Ethiopian Collard Greens Gomen
description: A buttery, aerated, and light Ethiopian dish featuring five spice powder, this gomen is perfect for a healthy and flavorful meal. It is smoke-cold and raw-friendly, making it a great option for those looking for a unique culinary experience.
instructions: Rinse the chopped collard greens in cold water and drain well.
In a large skillet, melt 1 tablespoon of unsalted butter over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the chopped onion and cook for 2 minutes, until softened.
Add the chopped collard greens and cook for 3 minutes, until wilted.
Stir in the five spice powder, salt, and black pepper.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stir in the remaining 1 tablespoon of unsalted butter and 2 tablespoons of lemon juice.
Serve the gomen hot, garnished with additional lemon wedges if desired.
